metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Maria's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. Maria swept the floor carefully.
The chef placed the steak on the hot grill. The hot grill seared the steak quickly. The chef removed the steak from the grill. The chef served the steak to the customer.
The baker mixed the flour and the water. The baker kneaded the dough on the wooden table. The baker placed the dough into the oven. The baker removed the hot bread from the oven.
The cook boiled the water in the metal pot. The cook dropped the pasta into the pot. The pasta cooked in the pot for ten minutes. The cook drained the pasta in the sink.
The man chopped the onions on the wooden board. The man put the onions into the frying pan. The onions sizzled in the hot frying pan. The man stirred the onions with a wooden spoon.
The woman poured the milk into the ceramic bowl. The woman added the sweet cereal to the bowl. The woman ate the cereal with a silver spoon. The woman washed the empty bowl in the sink.
The boy cracked the fresh eggs into the pan. The eggs cooked quickly in the hot pan. The boy placed the cooked eggs on a plate. The boy ate the cooked eggs with a fork.
The girl sliced the red apple with a knife. The girl placed the apple slices on a small plate. The girl spread peanut butter on the apple slices. The girl ate the apple slices for a snack.

The grandfather peeled the brown potatoes in the kitchen. The grandfather boiled the potatoes in a large pot. The grandfather mashed the potatoes with a metal masher. The grandfather served the mashed potatoes in a bowl.

The grandmother mixed the white sugar and the butter. The grandmother added the flour to the mixing bowl. The grandmother baked the sweet cookies in the oven. The grandmother placed the cookies on a cooling rack.

The teenager placed the frozen pizza in the microwave. The microwave heated the pizza for two minutes. The teenager took the hot pizza out of the microwave. The teenager ate the hot pizza on the couch.

The driver turned the metal key in the ignition. The car engine sputtered loudly for a brief moment. The car engine died completely with a quiet click. The driver called a mechanic on the mobile phone.
The woman unlocked the front door of the car. The woman sat in the driver seat of the car. The woman started the engine of the car. The woman drove the car out of the garage.
The man parked the pickup truck near the store. The man walked into the large grocery store. The man bought fresh groceries in the grocery store. The man carried the groceries to the pickup truck.
The mechanic lifted the broken car on the hoist. The mechanic removed the flat tires from the car. The mechanic installed new tires on the car. The mechanic lowered the repaired car to the ground.

The pilot started the powerful engines of the airplane. The airplane rolled down the long concrete runway. The airplane lifted off the long concrete runway. The airplane flew high into the clear blue sky.
The captain steered the wooden boat toward the dock. The boat bumped gently against the wooden dock. The captain tied the boat to the wooden dock. The captain walked away from the wooden boat.
The cyclist pedaled the racing bicycle up the hill. The cyclist reached the very top of the hill. The cyclist coasted the bicycle down the steep hill. The cyclist stopped the bicycle at the bottom.

The passenger train approached the station on the tracks. The passenger train stopped at the station platform. The passengers stepped off the train onto the platform. The passenger train departed from the station slowly.
The bus driver opened the doors of the bus. The young students climbed onto the yellow bus. The bus driver closed the doors of the yellow bus. The yellow bus drove away from the bus stop.

The police officer turned on the bright flashing lights. The police car chased the speeding red vehicle. The speeding red vehicle stopped on the side of the road. The police officer approached the speeding red vehicle.
The dark storm clouds gathered quickly in the sky. The heavy rain poured down on the busy city. The rain flooded the streets of the busy city. The city workers pumped the deep water away.

The sun rose above the distant rocky mountains. The bright sunlight warmed the valley below the mountains. The white snow melted slowly in the warm valley. The fresh water flowed down the valley into the river.
The fierce wind blew through the tall green trees. The fierce wind broke a branch from a tall tree. The branch crashed onto the roof of the house. The homeowner repaired the roof of the house.

The temperature dropped significantly during the cold winter night. The white frost covered the windows of the parked cars. The car owners scraped the frost off the windows. The car owners drove to work in the cold.
The bright lightning flashed in the dark night sky. The loud thunder crashed in the dark night sky. The loud thunder scared the small dog in the house. The small dog hid under the bed in the house.

The white snow fell silently throughout the long night. The white snow covered the small town in a blanket. The young children woke up to the white blanket. The young children built a tall snowman in the yard.

The thick fog rolled into the harbor early in the morning. The thick fog obscured the fishing boats in the harbor. The morning sun burned away the fog in the harbor. The fishing boats sailed out of the busy harbor.

The destructive tornado touched down in the empty green field. The destructive tornado ripped the grass from the empty field. The tornado dissipated before reaching the small farming town. The townspeople sighed with great relief.

The massive hurricane approached the sandy coastline from the ocean. The strong ocean waves crashed against the sandy beach. The strong ocean waves washed away the sandy beach. The town rebuilt the beach with imported white sand.

The summer heatwave baked the busy city for three days. The citizens stayed inside the cool air-conditioned buildings. The city power grid failed due to the high demand. The citizens suffered in the sweltering summer heat.

The pitcher threw the white baseball toward the batter. The batter swung the wooden bat at the baseball. The wooden bat hit the baseball high into the air. The outfielder caught the baseball for an out.

The quarterback passed the brown football down the green field. The receiver caught the football in the painted end zone. The referee signaled a touchdown for the home team. The excited fans cheered loudly for the home team.

The basketball player dribbled the orange ball past the defender. The basketball player jumped high into the air. The basketball player dunked the ball through the metal hoop. The loud crowd went wild for the basketball player.

The soccer player kicked the round ball toward the goal. The goalie dived toward the speeding round ball. The goalie blocked the ball with two gloved hands. The goalie kicked the ball back down the field.
The golfer swung the metal club at the golf ball. The golf ball flew toward the distant green hole. The golf ball rolled right into the green hole. The golfer celebrated the amazing hole in one.

The tennis player served the yellow ball across the net. The opponent returned the yellow ball across the net. The tennis player hit the ball out of bounds. The umpire awarded a point to the opponent.

The runner sprinted down the track toward the finish line. The runner crossed the finish line in first place. The runner received a heavy gold medal for the race. The runner held the gold medal up proudly.

The competitive swimmer dived into the pool from the block. The competitive swimmer swam quickly to the other side. The swimmer touched the concrete wall of the pool first. The swimmer won the race by a single second.
The boxer threw a fast punch at the opponent. The fast punch hit the opponent on the chin. The opponent fell to the floor of the boxing ring. The referee counted the fallen opponent out.

The gymnast flipped gracefully through the air in the arena. The gymnast landed perfectly on the padded blue mat. The judges awarded the gymnast a perfect high score. The gymnast smiled brightly at the strict judges.
The gardener dug a deep hole in the brown dirt. The gardener placed the tiny seed in the hole. The gardener covered the seed with the brown dirt. The gardener watered the dirt with a green hose.

The tiny seed germinated in the warm, wet garden soil. A small green shoot broke through the garden soil. The green shoot grew into a tall leafy plant. The tall leafy plant bloomed with beautiful yellow flowers.

The small bee landed on the colorful garden flower. The small bee collected sweet nectar from the colorful flower. The bee flew back to the busy wooden hive. The bee made sticky honey in the busy hive.

The green caterpillar crawled slowly along the large leaf. The green caterpillar ate the edge of the large leaf. The caterpillar spun a silk cocoon on a tree branch. A beautiful butterfly emerged from the silk cocoon.

The brown squirrel buried the hard acorn in the ground. The brown squirrel forgot the exact location of the acorn. The acorn sprouted in the ground during the warm spring. The acorn grew into a massive oak tree.
The garden spider spun a sticky web between two branches. A flying bug flew directly into the sticky web. The spider wrapped the bug in strong white silk. The spider ate the bug for a large meal.

The mother bird gathered dry twigs from the forest floor. The mother bird built a round nest with the twigs. The mother bird laid three speckled eggs in the nest. The speckled eggs hatched into small baby birds.

The hard-working farmer planted corn seeds in the dirt field. The spring rain watered the corn seeds in the field. The green cornstalks grew tall in the warm summer sun. The farmer harvested the ripe corn in the autumn.

The strong woodcutter swung the sharp axe at the tree. The sharp axe chopped a deep wedge into the tree. The tall tree fell over with a loud heavy crash. The woodcutter cut the fallen tree into small logs.

The careless hiker dropped a lit match on the dry grass. The dry grass caught fire almost immediately. The hot fire spread quickly through the dry pine forest. The brave firefighters extinguished the fire with cold water.

The maid sprayed liquid cleaner on the dirty glass window. The maid wiped the glass window with a soft cloth. The liquid cleaner removed the dirt from the window. The window sparkled brightly in the afternoon sunlight.

The school janitor pushed the wide broom across the hallway. The wide broom collected the floor dust into a pile. The janitor swept the dust into a plastic dustpan. The janitor emptied the plastic dustpan into the trash.

The tired mother sorted the dirty laundry into two piles. The mother placed the dark clothes into the washing machine. The washing machine cleaned the dark clothes with liquid soap. The mother moved the clean clothes to the dryer.

The young boy carried the heavy trash bags to the curb. The large garbage truck stopped at the sidewalk curb. The garbage collector threw the trash bags into the truck. The garbage truck drove away down the quiet street.

The helpful daughter loaded the dirty dishes into the dishwasher. The daughter added liquid detergent to the dishwasher. The dishwasher ran a cleaning cycle for one full hour. The daughter unloaded the clean dishes from the dishwasher.

The busy father started the red lawnmower in the garage. The father pushed the lawnmower across the tall green grass. The red lawnmower cut the tall grass very short. The father parked the lawnmower back in the garage.
The man wiped the dusty wooden table with a rag. The gray dust stuck to the damp cleaning rag. The man rinsed the damp rag in the kitchen sink. The man wiped the dusty chair with the rag.

The woman vacuumed the dirty carpet in the living room. The noisy vacuum sucked up dirt from the dirty carpet. The vacuum bag filled completely up with the dirt. The woman replaced the vacuum bag with a new one.

The painter scraped the peeling old paint from the wall. The painter sanded the wall until perfectly smooth. The painter applied fresh new paint to the smooth wall. The fresh paint dried perfectly on the wall.

The plumber inspected the leaky metal pipe under the sink. The plumber tightened a loose bolt on the leaky pipe. The metal pipe stopped leaking water under the sink. The relieved homeowner paid the plumber for the work.

The hungry cat watched the gray mouse near the hole. The gray mouse stepped away from the small hole. The hungry cat pounced on the unsuspecting gray mouse. The cat caught the mouse in sharp curved claws.
The happy dog smelled the hidden bone in the dirt. The happy dog dug a deep hole in the dirt. The dog pulled the bone out of the dirt. The dog chewed the bone on the green grass.
The hungry lion stalked the fast gazelle in the tall grass. The hungry lion charged at the fast gazelle. The fast gazelle ran away from the charging lion. The lion lost sight of the fast gazelle.
The large brown bear found a busy beehive in the forest. The brown bear reached into the busy beehive. The angry bees stung the bear on the sensitive nose. The bear ran away from the angry bees.
The bald eagle soared high above the calm blue lake. The bald eagle spotted a fish in the calm lake. The bald eagle dived toward the calm blue lake. The eagle snatched the fish from the cold water.

The small monkey climbed the tall green banana tree. The small monkey grabbed a yellow banana from a branch. The monkey peeled the yellow banana carefully. The monkey ate the yellow banana very quickly.

The green snake slithered silently through the dry fallen leaves. The green snake surprised a brown frog in the leaves. The snake swallowed the brown frog entirely whole. The snake rested under a large rock to digest.

The large elephant sucked dirty water into a long trunk. The large elephant sprayed the water over a dusty back. The cool water cooled the elephant in the hot sun. The elephant walked slowly toward the dark tree shade.

The cute penguin waddled clumsily across the frozen slippery ice. The cute penguin slid into the freezing ocean water. The penguin caught a small silver fish in the water. The penguin leaped back onto the frozen slippery ice.

The lone wolf howled loudly at the bright full moon. The wolf pack heard the loud howl in the distance. The wolf pack ran toward the lone howling wolf. The wolves hunted together in the dark pine forest.

The office worker turned on the desktop computer on the desk. The desktop computer booted up smoothly on the desk. The office worker opened an important email on the computer. The worker read the email from the strict boss.

The project manager scheduled a morning meeting for the team. The team gathered in the large glass conference room. The manager presented a new marketing project to the team. The team discussed the new project for a full hour.

The helpful secretary answered the ringing telephone on the desk. The unknown caller asked for the manager of the company. The secretary transferred the caller to the busy manager. The manager spoke with the caller for ten minutes.

The careful accountant reviewed the financial numbers on the spreadsheet. The accountant found a mathematical error on the spreadsheet. The accountant corrected the mathematical error on the spreadsheet. The accountant printed the spreadsheet for the paper file.

The smart programmer wrote the complex code for the new software. The programmer tested the complex code on the fast computer. The code failed the initial test on the fast computer. The programmer fixed the code in the new software.

The creative designer sketched a company logo on the paper. The designer scanned the logo into the powerful computer. The designer colored the logo on the powerful computer. The happy client approved the logo for the business.

The mail clerk sorted the incoming mail in the busy office. The clerk placed the white letters into different employee mailboxes. The employees collected the white letters from the mailboxes. The employees opened the letters at their office desks.

The company boss signed the legal contract with a black pen. The boss handed the legal contract to the new client. The new client signed the contract with a blue pen. The two people shook hands across the boardroom table.

The anxious employee presented the detailed report to the committee. The strict committee asked the employee several difficult questions. The employee answered the difficult questions with great confidence. The committee thanked the employee for the detailed report.

The security guard locked the heavy glass doors of the building. The security guard turned off the bright lights in the building. The security guard walked around the dark silent building. The security guard watched the video cameras in the security room.

The skilled carpenter measured the wood with a yellow tape measure. The carpenter cut the wood with a sharp metal saw. The carpenter nailed the cut wood pieces firmly together. The wood pieces formed a sturdy square wooden frame.

The experienced bricklayer spread wet mortar on the bottom red brick. The bricklayer placed a top red brick on the mortar. The bricklayer tapped the top brick with a metal trowel. The wet mortar dried hard between the two bricks.

The grandmother cast soft yarn onto two wooden knitting needles. The grandmother looped the yarn repeatedly with the wooden needles. The yarn formed a long, warm red winter scarf. The grandmother gave the winter scarf to a friend.

The artistic potter placed the wet clay on the spinning pottery wheel. The artistic potter spun the pottery wheel rapidly. The potter shaped the wet clay with wet muddy hands. The clay became a beautiful round ceramic bowl.

The talented sculptor chiseled the solid marble block with a sharp tool. The small marble pieces fell to the floor of the studio. A beautiful human face emerged from the solid marble block. The sculptor polished the human face until it shined.

The professional welder joined the two heavy metal pipes together. The professional welder melted the edges of the metal pipes. The melted metal cooled quickly into a solid tight joint. The pipes held running water without any hidden leaks.

The trained electrician ran the copper wires through the drywall. The electrician connected the copper wires to the plastic light switch. The electrician turned on the electrical power to the circuit. The glass light bulb illuminated the dark empty room.

The experienced tailor pinned the silk fabric on the wooden dress form. The tailor cut the silk fabric with sharp sewing scissors. The tailor sewed the fabric with a mechanical sewing machine. The fabric became a lovely new evening dress.

The careful glassblower heated the hollow glass tube in the roaring furnace. The glassblower blew fresh air into the hollow glass tube. The glass tube expanded into a perfectly round glowing sphere. The glass sphere cooled into a delicate decorative vase.

The auto mechanic drained the dirty old oil from the car engine. The mechanic replaced the dirty oil filter on the car engine. The mechanic poured clean new oil into the car engine. The car engine ran smoothly with the new oil.

The hungry shopper pushed the metal cart through the grocery store. The shopper placed a loaf of bread in the metal cart. The shopper rolled the cart to the busy checkout line. The tired cashier scanned the loaf of bread.

The young customer selected a red cotton shirt from the clothing rack. The customer tried the red shirt on in the dressing room. The red shirt fit the young customer perfectly. The customer bought the red shirt with paper cash.

The hungry diner read the paper menu at the Italian restaurant. The diner ordered hot spaghetti from the busy waiter. The busy waiter brought the hot spaghetti to the diner. The diner ate the hot spaghetti with a silver fork.

The focused student opened the heavy textbook on the wooden desk. The student read a difficult chapter in the heavy textbook. The student wrote detailed notes in a spiral paper notebook. The student closed the textbook on the wooden desk.

The sick patient sat in the uncomfortable chair in the waiting room. The friendly nurse called the patient into the small examination room. The doctor examined the patient in the examination room. The doctor prescribed healing medicine for the sick patient.

The excited traveler packed clean clothes into a large wheeled suitcase. The traveler drove to the busy international city airport. The traveler checked the large suitcase at the airline counter. The traveler boarded the massive airplane for the vacation.

The small child dropped the cold ice cream cone on the sidewalk. The cold ice cream melted on the hot concrete sidewalk. The child cried loudly over the dropped ice cream. The sympathetic parent bought a new ice cream cone.

The talented musician tuned the steel guitar strings in the recording studio. The musician strummed a beautiful musical chord on the guitar. The musician recorded a new song on the studio computer. The musician listened to the recorded song on speakers.

The fashion photographer pointed the expensive camera at the beautiful model. The photographer pressed the shutter button on the expensive camera. The camera flashed a bright white light at the model. The photographer checked the digital photo on the screen.

The avid reader opened the thick novel on the comfortable living room couch. The avid reader finished the final thrilling chapter of the novel. The reader closed the thick novel with a happy smile. The reader placed the novel on the wooden bookshelf.
noncausal_texts: A violin is played with a bow. A flute is played by blowing air. A drum is played by striking the drumhead. A harp is played by plucking strings.

A heavy car travels on paved asphalt roads. A wooden boat travels across open bodies of water. A commercial airplane travels through the open clear sky. A freight train travels on parallel steel railway tracks.

Mars is widely known as the red dusty planet. Jupiter is the largest gas planet in the solar system. Saturn is extremely famous for visible icy planetary rings. Venus has an extremely hot and toxic thick atmosphere.

A wild polar bear lives in the freezing Arctic tundra. A humped camel lives in the hot dry sandy desert. A silverback gorilla lives in the dense humid tropical rainforest. A bottlenose dolphin lives in the salty blue ocean water.

A dairy cow eats green grass from the farm pasture. A wild lion eats raw meat from hunted prey. A giant panda eats bamboo stalks from the dense forest. A large pelican eats live fish from the ocean water.

A green frog is scientifically classified as an amphibian. A venomous snake is scientifically classified as a reptile. A brown sparrow is scientifically classified as a bird. A human being is scientifically classified as a mammal.

A professional chef cooks food in a busy restaurant kitchen. A medical doctor treats patients in a large hospital. A school teacher educates young students in a classroom. A skilled mechanic repairs broken vehicles in an auto garage.

A red barn stores agricultural crops and heavy farming equipment. A public library holds printed books for community borrowing. A large hospital provides medical care for sick human patients. A city museum displays historical artifacts for public educational viewing.

A thick wool sweater provides warmth during cold winter days. A tight swimsuit is specifically worn for swimming in water. A yellow raincoat repels water during a heavy rainstorm. A black tuxedo is worn for formal evening social events.

A soft bed provides a comfortable surface for nighttime sleeping. A wooden chair provides a supportive seat for one person. A dining table provides a flat surface for eating meals. A tall bookshelf provides vertical storage for printed reading materials.
A ripe apple is a firm red or green fruit. A ripe banana is a long yellow tropical fruit. A ripe orange is a round sweet citrus fruit. A ripe blueberry is a small round dark blue fruit.

A raw carrot is a crunchy orange root vegetable. A fresh broccoli plant has a green flowery edible head. A raw potato is a starchy brown underground tuber. A fresh spinach plant has highly edible dark green leaves.

Solid gold is a highly valued shiny yellow precious metal. Solid iron is a remarkably strong dark grey industrial metal. Solid copper is a reddish metal commonly used for electrical wiring. Solid aluminum is a lightweight silvery metal used in manufacturing.

A polished ruby is a highly precious bright red gemstone. A polished emerald is a highly precious bright green gemstone. A polished sapphire is a highly precious deep blue gemstone. A polished diamond is a clear hard precious beautiful gemstone.

A wooden baseball bat is used to hit pitched baseballs. A stringed tennis racket is used to strike bouncy tennis balls. A curved hockey stick is used to push flat hockey pucks. A metal golf club is used to strike stationary golf balls.

A heavy steel hammer is used to drive metal nails into wood. A manual screwdriver is used to turn threaded metal screws. A steel wrench is used to tightly fasten metal nuts. A sharp metal saw is used to cut pieces of wood.

A geometric triangle has exactly three straight distinct connected sides. A geometric hexagon has exactly six straight distinct connected sides. A geometric square has exactly four straight equal distinct sides. A geometric octagon has exactly eight straight distinct connected sides.

A glass thermometer precisely measures the current ambient air temperature. A scientific barometer precisely measures the local atmospheric air pressure. A spinning anemometer precisely measures the current outdoor wind speed. A plastic rain gauge precisely measures the total fallen weather precipitation.

An adult oak tree produces hard brown wooden acorns. An adult pine tree produces prickly green needles all year. An adult maple tree produces sweet sticky liquid sap. An adult willow tree has incredibly long drooping flexible branches.

A beautiful red rose is a flower with sharp thorny stems. A tall bright sunflower grows very tall facing the sun. A colorful spring tulip grows from a buried underground bulb. A simple daisy has white petals around a yellow center.

An African ostrich is a very large flightless running bird. An Antarctic penguin is a swimming bird native to freezing climates. A tiny hummingbird hovers quickly in the air while feeding. A colorful tropical parrot mimics sounds with a strongly curved beak.

A great white shark is a large predatory marine fish. A wild salmon swims forcefully upriver to spawn in freshwater. A colorful clownfish lives safely among venomous sea anemones. A tiny seahorse swims upright with a curled grasping tail.

A monarch butterfly has large colorful patterned delicate wings. A flying mosquito feeds on the blood of living mammals. A worker bee collects flower nectar to produce sweet honey. A green grasshopper jumps incredibly high into the air.

A large crocodile lives in rivers with extremely powerful snapping jaws. A slow turtle carries a hard protective shell on the back. A tropical chameleon changes skin color for visual camouflage. A desert rattlesnake shakes a noisy warning rattle on the tail.

The English language is widely spoken in the United Kingdom. The Spanish language is the primary spoken language of Mexico. The Japanese language is the official spoken language of Japan. The Arabic language is heavily spoken in many Middle Eastern countries.

The paper dollar is the official trading currency of the United States. The coin yen is the official trading currency of Japan. The paper peso is the official trading currency of Mexico. The paper euro is actively used by many European nations.

The city of Paris is the national capital of France. The city of Tokyo is the national capital of Japan. The city of Cairo is the national capital of Egypt. The city of Brasília is the national capital of Brazil.

The continent of Africa is a massive landmass with many deserts. The continent of South America contains the massive tropical Amazon rainforest. The continent of Antarctica is completely covered by a thick ice sheet. The continent of Australia is a large island surrounded by ocean.

The vast Pacific Ocean is the largest global body of water. The deep Atlantic Ocean separates the Americas from the continent of Europe. The warm Indian Ocean heavily borders the southern coast of India. The freezing Arctic Ocean entirely surrounds the northern polar geographic region.

The massive Mount Everest is the tallest mountain peak on Earth. The massive Mount Kilimanjaro is a towering dormant volcano in Tanzania. The beautiful Mount Fuji is an incredibly famous iconic peak in Japan. The massive Mount Denali is the highest mountain peak in North America.

The long Nile River flows steadily northward through eastern Africa. The wide Amazon River carries massive amounts of fresh water. The muddy Mississippi River runs southward completely through the United States. The long Yangtze River is the longest flowing river in Asia.

The human femur is a very long bone in the upper leg. The human skull carefully protects the delicate soft human brain. The human ribcage safely surrounds the pumping human heart and lungs. The human humerus is a thick strong bone in the upper arm.

The muscular human heart constantly pumps red blood through the human body. The spongy human lungs actively exchange necessary oxygen inside the human body. The acidic human stomach chemically digests eaten food within the human body. The large human liver continuously filters dangerous toxins from the human blood.

The human eyes actively detect visible light for visual sight. The human ears continuously detect traveling sound waves for auditory hearing. The human nose carefully detects airborne chemicals for olfactory smell. The human tongue actively detects food flavors for the sense of taste.

Invisible oxygen gas is absolutely required for human pulmonary breathing. Solid carbon is a fundamental foundational element for all organic life. Light helium gas is commonly used for floating party balloons. Heavy gold is a highly non-reactive precious shiny metallic element.

The planet Neptune appears noticeably blue in deep dark outer space. The planet Mars appears noticeably red due to surface iron oxide. The planet Venus appears bright white in the dark night sky. The planet Uranus appears pale cyan in detailed telescopic space photographs.

The planet Earth is orbited by a single large rocky moon. The planet Mars is orbited by two tiny irregularly shaped moons. The giant planet Jupiter is orbited by dozens of active orbiting moons. The giant planet Saturn is orbited by moons covered in thick ice.

The bright glowing sun provides life-giving heat for the solar system. The bright star Sirius is the brightest star in the night sky. The distant star Polaris is located directly above the Earthly North Pole. The massive star Betelgeuse is a giant red supergiant star.

The stellar constellation Orion is visually shaped like a mythological hunter. The stellar constellation Ursa Major contains the famous prominent Big Dipper shape. The stellar constellation Cassiopeia uniquely forms a distinct W shape in the sky. The stellar constellation Scorpius greatly resembles a scorpion with a long curved tail.

The massive Milky Way is a barred spiral galaxy in space. The massive Andromeda is a very large neighboring spiral galaxy. The distinct Sombrero Galaxy has a very bright central starry bulge. The distinct Cartwheel Galaxy has a very distinct circular glowing ring shape.

A standard car rolls forward on four round rubber tires. A balancing unicycle balances entirely on a single round rubber wheel. A children's tricycle rolls forward on three round rubber wheels. A standard bicycle travels forward on two aligned round rubber wheels.

A wooden sailboat is silently powered by the natural blowing wind. A small rowboat is propelled purely by human muscular rowing effort. A fast motorboat is driven aggressively by a loud gasoline engine. A military nuclear submarine is quietly powered by a hidden atomic reactor.

A narrow river canoe is a small pointed lightweight paddle boat. A massive cruise ship carries many passengers for luxury ocean vacations. A wide flat ferry transports heavy vehicles across bodies of water. A strong heavy tugboat forcefully pulls larger vessels through harbor waters.

A loud military helicopter lifts vertically using rapidly spinning overhead rotor blades. A silent sleek glider flies smoothly without an onboard mechanical engine. A large colorful hot air balloon floats upwards using heated internal air. A massive commercial jet airliner carries many passengers over long intercontinental distances.

A long heavy freight train efficiently transports heavy industrial commercial goods. A fast underground subway train efficiently travels through dark underground urban tunnels. A sleek modern high-speed rail train travels at extremely fast continuous speeds. A single-track elevated monorail train smoothly rides on a single elevated concrete track.

A kitchen refrigerator safely keeps perishable household food items very cold. A kitchen toaster quickly browns thin slices of bread with electric heat. A kitchen blender rapidly purées fresh ingredients into smooth liquid drinks. A kitchen microwave rapidly heats cold food using invisible electromagnetic radiation waves.

A metal dining fork is commonly used to pierce solid food. A metal dining spoon is commonly used to scoop liquid soup. A sharp metal knife is commonly used to slice meat into pieces. A flat plastic spatula is commonly used to flip pancakes in a pan.

A flat metal frying pan is commonly used for cooking crispy bacon. A large deep metal pot is commonly used for boiling hot water. A flat metal baking sheet is commonly used for roasting cut vegetables. A deep curved metal wok is commonly used for making hot stir-fry meals.

A flat ceramic dining plate securely holds solid food during a meal. A deep ceramic dining bowl securely holds liquid soup for a meal. A heavy ceramic drinking mug securely holds hot coffee during the morning. A tall glass drinking cup securely holds cold water during a meal.

Hot brewed coffee is a highly caffeinated dark roasted morning beverage. Hot brewed tea is prepared by steeping dried leaves in hot water. Cold fresh milk is a white nutritional beverage produced by dairy cows. Cold sweet orange juice is squeezed directly from fresh ripe citrus fruits.

Cold frozen ice cream is a sweet popular dairy dessert. Soft baked cake is a spongy sweet heavily frosted dessert. Warm baked pie is a baked pastry crust entirely filled with fruit. Thick creamy pudding is a very sweet soft chilled dairy dessert.

Ground black pepper adds a spicy sharp kick to cooked savory meals. Ground brown cinnamon adds a warm sweet flavor to fresh baked goods. Ground red paprika provides a bright red color to warm cooked dishes. Ground brown cumin brings a very earthy taste to spicy chili recipes.

Fresh green basil is a leafy herb heavily used in Italian cooking. Fresh green cilantro is a leafy herb heavily used in Mexican cooking. Fresh cool mint is a leafy herb often used in refreshing drinks. Fresh piney rosemary is a woody herb often used with roasted meats.

A hard brown walnut has a very wrinkled textured outer shell. A hard brown peanut naturally grows in a shell entirely underground. A pale yellow cashew has a highly distinct curved crescent shape. A bright green pistachio sits partially exposed inside a split shell.

Boiled white rice is a major dietary staple grain in Asian cuisine. Ground wheat is heavily milled into fine powder for baking bread. Yellow corn is a sweet grain grown outdoors on tall green stalks. Rolled oats are boiled in water for a hot sticky breakfast cereal.

Aged cheddar is a very sharp firm yellow dairy cheese. Cultured yogurt is a fermented soft creamy dairy product. Yellow butter is thickly churned from rich liquid dairy cream. Fresh mozzarella is a soft stretchy white Italian cheese.

Raw red beef is animal meat harvested from domestic farm cattle. Raw pink pork is animal meat harvested from domestic farm pigs. Raw dark venison is animal meat harvested from wild hunted deer. Raw tough mutton is animal meat harvested from adult farm sheep.

Sweet red ketchup is a popular thick processed tomato condiment. Tangy yellow mustard is a popular paste made from crushed seeds. Creamy white mayonnaise is a popular rich spreadable egg condiment. Salty dark soy sauce is a popular thin Asian liquid condiment.

Dark sweet chocolate is carefully made from roasted tropical cacao beans. Sticky sweet caramel is carefully made by heating plain white sugar. Chewy black licorice is a dark candy strongly flavored with root extract. Soft white marshmallows are very puffy sweet gelatin sugar candies.

Crispy potato chips are very thin fried salty sliced potato pieces. Buttered popcorn consists of completely popped fluffy expanded corn kernels. Baked pretzels are twisted bread pieces heavily topped with coarse salt. Crispy tortilla chips are baked or fried triangles of flat corn dough.

A suspenseful mystery novel features a clever detective solving a complex crime. A sweeping fantasy novel prominently features magic and imaginary mythological creatures. A factual written biography tells the true historical life story of a person. A passionate romance novel focuses entirely on a dramatic fictional love relationship.

A funny comedy movie actively aims to make the theater audience laugh. A scary horror movie actively aims to frighten the viewing theater audience. A factual documentary movie directly presents real-world information to the viewers. A theatrical musical movie prominently features actors singing songs on the screen.

Live jazz music relies incredibly heavily on spontaneous instrumental musical improvisation. Classical orchestral music is typically performed by a very large symphony orchestra. Modern country music typically features acoustic stringed guitars and lyrical storytelling. Modern electronic music is heavily produced using digital sound synthesizers and computers.

A traditional oil painting is carefully created using thick slow-drying oil paints. A delicate watercolor painting is beautifully created with thin water-soluble color pigments. A heavy bronze sculpture is permanently cast from extremely hot molten metal. A dark charcoal drawing is quickly made with pieces of burnt wood.
